demographics.living_situation: lives with a roommate, who is present and helping make the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I am so utterly exhausted I can't lift my head, I'm freezing even with the heater on full, and I haven't passed a bowel motion in ten days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The exhaustion and the cold have been building for weeks, but tonight the big problem is that my belly is bloated and sore and nothing is moving — I feel sick with it.

symptom_narrative.onset: crept up gradually over the past month
symptom_narrative.duration: about a month of feeling worse and worse; no bowel motion for the last ten days
symptom_narrative.character: a bone-deep tiredness, feeling frozen all the time, and a bloated, uncomfortable belly with nothing passing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst exhaustion I've ever felt — I genuinely can't lift my head off the pillow
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the tiredness and cold are all over; the bloating and discomfort are across my whole belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and slowly getting worse rather than coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own; the over-the-counter laxative I tried did nothing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've put on about 8 kilos even though I've barely been eating, my roommate says my voice has gone deep and croaky and my speech has slowed down, and I feel a bit queasy
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely housebound; I can't do anything, I'm just wrapped in blankets

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a roommate who has noticed the change in voice and how slowed and 'out of it' the patient has become

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video call, not an examination

objective_data_offered.value: wrapped in several heavy blankets and shivering even though the heater is on full and the room is very warm
voice has become deep and hoarse and speech is noticeably slow; roommate says the patient is very slow to respond and seems 'out of it'
belly looks bloated and distended and the patient is guarding it because it is sore
